home.title: Ski Resorts Map in Switzerland
home.description: Discover all ski resorts in Switzerland with our interactive map. Explore the ski areas, compare regions, and plan your trip.
home.mapLoadError: The map could not be loaded. Please try again or view the full version.
home.mapInstructions: Use the filter buttons on the map to display only Magic Pass stations, filter by ski area or by price. Click on the filter icon on the left side of the map to access the options.
